narrative:
Madison Township B (precinct in Licking County) has 899 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.4 percentage points.
